bridgeTerminologyHits.text: - Renamed the package identity from `com.deucarian.object-selection.core-state-bridge` to `com.deucarian.object-selection.core-state-integration`.

Migration note: replace old manifest entries for `com.deucarian.object-selection.core-state-bridge` with `com.deucarian.object-selection.core-state-integration`. The source repository URL still uses `Object-Selection-Bri
- Renamed Package Installer registry, graph, and UI terminology from Bridge packages to Integration packages.
- Added migration coverage for the old bridge package IDs that are replaced by integration package IDs.
The Package Installer now shows only the Integration package IDs. Remove or replace old bridge IDs in Unity `Packages/manifest.json`:
The Git repository URLs still use their existing `Bridge.git` names until those GitHub repositories are manually renamed.
Integration packages use `category` value `Integration`; the old bridge package IDs are replaced by `api-integration` and `core-state-integration` package IDs.
- Updated suite dependencies, docs, samples, and validation tooling to use Integration package IDs instead of Bridge package IDs.
- Migration: replace old suite manifest references to Core State bridge packages with `com.deucarian.ui-binding.core-state-integration` and `com.deucarian.object-selection.core-state-integration`.
- Renamed package ecosystem references from API bridge to API integration.
- Renamed the package identity from `com.deucarian.session.api-bridge` to `com.deucarian.session.api-integration`.
- Renamed APIBridge assemblies, namespaces, tests, and samples to APIIntegration.
- Migration: remove the old bridge package ID from Unity manifests and add `com.deucarian.session.api-integration`.

Migration note: replace old manifest entries for `com.deucarian.session.api-bridge` with `com.deucarian.session.api-integration`. The source repository URL still uses `Session-API-Bridge.git` until the GitHub repository
- Renamed package ecosystem references from CoreState bridge packages to Integration packages.

capabilityMatrix.description: Category-based local package logging and Unity console forwarding.
Shared editor chrome, icons, resources, style tokens, editor-only UI Toolkit helpers.
General HTTP/API request construction, transport, serialization, authentication, and cancellation.
Authenticated session lifecycle, restore, refresh, logout, and persistence contracts.
Object, scene, and AssetBundle loading lifecycle and handles.
Generic keyed repositories, selection state, and repository primitives.
UI routing, screens, channels, modals, guards, transitions, and back navigation.
Keyed world-object selection, hover tracking, raycast adapters, and highlight hooks.
Runtime palettes, theme assets, color roles, and UI theme adapters.
Diagnostics providers, snapshots, JSON export, overlays, and aggregation.
Package discovery, install/update/remove, channels, registry composition, and ecosystem visualization.
Catalog, category hierarchy, dependency metadata, Integration metadata, Suite metadata, and governance metadata.
Potential tiny shared UnityEngine.Object lifetime primitives if the dedicated audit justifies a Common package.
